name: Papa's Pastaria
author: Poki
description: Papa's Pastaria is a restaurant management game created by Flipline Studios. Manage Papa's newest restaurant in Portallini where you'll take orders, cook noodles, and add sauces and toppings to craft a perfect plate of pasta! Control at each step of the pasta-making process and juggle between each area of the restaurant. Use your hard-earned tips to buy restaurant upgrades and hats to wear, and you can also decorate your lobby with furniture and posters from the Furniture Shop. Don't forget to share this legendary game with your friends! How to play: Select, drag and move ingredients - Left mouse button About the creator: Papa's Pastaria was created by Flipline Studios, and was later emulated in HTML5 by AwayFL. Play their other Papa's Games on Poki: Papa's Pizzeria , Papa's Burgeria and Papa's Taco Mia
